question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/CommonConfiguration.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: dataSource()] Can an unprivileged external user cause the DatabaseWaiter to log exception messages of unbounded length (via e.getMessage()) by crafting a JDBC driver exception with a very large message string, causing excessive I/O in the logging subsystem and degrading performance?
